.navbar2_dropdwn-toggle { align-items: center; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; padding: 0.75rem 2rem 0.75rem 0px; display: flex; }
.navbar_logo-link { order: 0; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: center; display: flex; }

.navbar_container { column-gap: var(--_layout---spacing--medium); row-gap: var(--_layout---spacing--medium); grid-template-rows: auto; grid-template-columns: minmax(max-content, max-content) minmax(max-content, max-content) minmax(max-content, max-content); grid-auto-columns: 1fr; display: grid; }
.menu-icon2 { flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; width: 48px; height: 48px; margin-right: -0.5rem; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-right: 0px; display: flex; }
.navbar2_menu-dropdown { flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; font-size: 1.125rem; display: flex; }
.navbar_link { color: var(--brand--black); text-align: left; flex: 0 1 auto; order: 0; align-self: auto; padding: 0px 0px 1.5rem; font-size: 1.125rem; text-decoration: none; display: block; }
.navbar_link.is-dropdrown { flex: 0 1 auto; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: center; width: 100%; max-width: none; margin-left: 0px; margin-right: 0px; padding-bottom: 0px; display: block; }

.navbar_menu { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--\<unknown\|relume-variable-color-scheme-1-border\>); background-color: var(--\<unknown\|relume-variable-color-scheme-1-background\>); -webkit-text-fill-color: inherit; background-clip: border-box; justify-content: center; width: 100%; padding: 1rem 5% 2.5rem; display: flex; position: absolute; overflow: auto; }

.navbar_menu.is-page-height-tablet { column-gap: var(--_layout---spacing--medium); row-gap: var(--_layout---spacing--medium); border-top: 1px solid var(--brand--black); background-color: rgb(247, 247, 242); flex-flow: column; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; width: 100%; height: 100dvh; padding-top: 2.5rem; padding-bottom: 6.5rem; transition: height 0.5s; left: auto; }
.navbar_menu.is-nav-links { flex-flow: column; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start; display: block; }

.menu-icon2_line-middle { background-color: var(--\<unknown\|relume-variable-color-scheme-1-text\>); justify-content: center; align-items: center; width: 24px; height: 2px; margin-top: 6px; margin-bottom: 6px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-right: 0px; display: flex; }
.navbar2_dropdown-link { text-align: center; width: auto; padding: 0.75rem 0px; font-size: 16px; }
.image-wrap { width: 100%; min-height: auto; max-height: none; display: none; }
.button-reservation-wrap { background-color: var(--brand--transparent); justify-content: center; align-items: center; display: flex; }
.menu-icon { flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; width: 48px; height: 48px; margin-right: -0.5rem; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-right: 0px; display: flex; }
.navbar1_menu-buttons { flex-direction: column; grid-template-rows: auto auto; grid-template-columns: 1fr; align-items: stretch; margin-top: 1.5rem; margin-left: 0px; }
.menu-icon_line-top { background-color: var(--brand--off-white); width: 24px; height: 1.5px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-right: 0px; }
.navbar1_dropdown-toggle { align-items: center; padding-top: 0.75rem; padding-bottom: 0.75rem; padding-left: 0px; display: flex; }
.menu-icon_line-bottom { background-color: var(--brand--off-white); width: 24px; height: 1.5px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-right: 0px; }

.menu-icon_line-middle { background-color: var(--brand--off-white); justify-content: center; align-items: center; width: 24px; height: 1.5px; margin-top: 6px; margin-bottom: 6px; padding-bottom: 0px; padding-right: 0px; display: flex; }

.navbar1_menu { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--\<unknown\|relume-variable-color-scheme-1-border\>); background-color: var(--\<unknown\|relume-variable-color-scheme-1-background\>); -webkit-text-fill-color: inherit; background-clip: border-box; padding: 1rem 5% 2rem; position: absolute; overflow: auto; }
.hotel-info-arte-wrap { gap: 5rem; grid-template-rows: auto; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; grid-auto-columns: 1fr; display: grid; }
.dropdown-navbar { gap: 1.5rem; flex-flow: column; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: center; padding: 0px 0px 1.5rem; display: flex; }
.icon { margin-top: auto; margin-bottom: auto; margin-right: 0px; position: static; }

.footer-content-wrap { column-gap: var(--_layout---spacing--xlarge); row-gap: var(--_layout---spacing--xlarge); flex-flow: column; display: flex; }
.footer-links-wrap { gap: 1.5rem; flex-flow: column; grid-template-rows: auto; grid-template-columns: 1fr; display: flex; }
.image-wrap.is-large.is-sarau { justify-content: center; align-items: center; height: 29.5rem; min-height: auto; display: flex; }
.acomodacao-overlay { gap: 16px; mix-blend-mode: normal; flex-flow: row; grid-template-rows: auto auto; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; grid-auto-columns: 1fr; display: block; }
.section_saraubar.theme-dark.is-1 { flex-flow: column; height: auto; min-height: auto; display: flex; }
.sarau-bar-content.is-1 { flex-flow: column; height: auto; display: flex; }
.sarau-info-wrap { gap: 1.5rem; flex-flow: column; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: flex-start; display: flex; }
.sarau-info { text-align: left; justify-content: center; align-items: flex-start; }
.graph-sarau { max-width: 10.625rem; position: static; inset: 0% auto auto 0%; transform: none; }
.graph-sarau.is-2 { max-width: 19rem; display: inline-block; position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); }

.buttons-wrap-sarau-info { column-gap: var(--_layout---spacing--small); row-gap: var(--_layout---spacing--small); flex-flow: column; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: flex-start; display: flex; }
.chalo-info-wrap { gap: 1.5rem; flex-flow: column; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: flex-start; display: flex; }
.charlau-info { text-align: left; justify-content: center; align-items: flex-start; }
.graph-charlo { max-width: 19.375rem; position: absolute; inset: 50% auto auto 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); }
.graph-charlo.is-2 { max-width: 19rem; display: inline-block; position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); }
.graph-cha-cha { max-width: 20rem; position: absolute; inset: 50% auto auto 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); }
.graph-cha-cha.is-2 { max-width: 19rem; display: inline-block; position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); }
.graph-info-1 { max-width: none; display: block; position: absolute; inset: 50% auto auto 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); }
.graph-info-1.is-2 { max-width: 19rem; display: inline-block; position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); }

.navbar_link { color: var(--brand--black); flex: 0 1 auto; width: auto; }
.navbar_menu.is-page-height-tablet { flex-flow: row; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; width: 100%; left: auto; overflow: visible; }
.form-footer { gap: 1rem; flex-flow: column; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: flex-start; }
.footer-links-wrap { row-gap: 1.5rem; flex-flow: column; grid-template-columns: 1fr; display: flex; }
.slide-2-pagination-item { justify-content: flex-end; align-items: flex-start; height: 3rem; padding-top: 0px; }
.slide-2-pagination-item.w--current { gap: 0rem; justify-content: flex-end; align-items: flex-start; padding-top: 0px; }
.buttons-title-wrap { flex-flow: column; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: flex-start; }
.acomodacao-image { box-sizing: border-box; float: none; object-fit: cover; min-width: 0px; display: inline-block; position: static; overflow: clip; }
.section_header-2.theme-dark.is-section-header-2 { flex-flow: row; height: 126dvh; padding-bottom: 1rem; display: block; overflow: hidden; }
.header-2-content-info { justify-content: flex-start; align-items: flex-end; width: 100%; padding-left: 0px; display: block; }
.header-2-content-info-2 { justify-content: flex-start; align-items: flex-end; width: 100%; padding-left: 0px; display: block; }
.espaco-evento-content { gap: 2rem; grid-template-rows: auto auto; grid-template-columns: 1fr; grid-auto-columns: 1fr; width: 100%; max-width: 100%; display: grid; overflow: hidden; }
.premios-footer { gap: 1rem; grid-template-rows: auto; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; grid-auto-columns: 1fr; display: grid; }

[btn-hover-anim="underline"]::after { content: ""; position: absolute; width: 100%; transform: scaleX(0); border-radius: 5px; height: 1.5px; bottom: 0px; left: 0px; background: currentcolor; transform-origin: right bottom; transition: transform 0.25s ease-out; }
.w-dropdown-list.w--open { opacity: 1; pointer-events: auto; animation: 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1) 0s 1 normal none running dropdownSlide; }
